mapper.insert: insert into feed_reply ( feed_id, username, reply_content, deleted, parents_reply_id ) values( #{feedId}, #{username}, #{replyContent}, #{deleted}, #{parentsReplyId} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.reply_id AS replyId, r.feed_id AS feedId, r.username AS username, m.nickname AS nickname, r.reply_content AS replyContent, r.parents_reply_id AS parentsReplyId, parent_member.nickname AS parentNickname FROM feed_reply r JOIN member m ON r.username = m.username LEFT JOIN feed_reply parent_reply ON r.parents_reply_id = parent_reply.reply_id LEFT JOIN member parent_member ON parent_reply.username = parent_member.username WHERE r.feed_id = #{feedId} ORDER BY r.reply_id ASC

SELECT r.reply_id AS replyId, r.feed_id AS feedId, r.username AS username, m.nickname AS nickname, r.reply_content AS replyContent, r.parents_reply_id AS parentsReplyId, parent_member.nickname AS parentNickname FROM feed_reply r JOIN member m ON r.username = m.username LEFT JOIN feed_reply parent_reply ON r.parents_reply_id = parent_reply.reply_id LEFT JOIN member parent_member ON parent_reply.username = parent_member.username WHERE r.feed_id = #{feedId} ORDER BY r.reply_id ASC
